attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Sex at birth NOT stated in the source note (no pronouns or sex given) — inferred 'female' as a placeholder; MUST be confirmed on clinician review.
Age 28 stated in the source note; age_band 'adult'.
Geographic context not stated ('private residence') — inferred RA1_major_city and flagged.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the in-person clinician's neurological exam, cardiovascular auscultation, orthostatic vitals and skull palpation are sealed in nodes 10/11 as clinician-measured findings the AI Doctor cannot obtain; the AI-correct action is recognition + urgent same-day in-person assessment + head-injury safety-netting.

Tier discrimination: final diagnosis is benign vasovagal syncope, but baseline tier set to T4 (higher than the in-person clinician's reassure-and-discharge disposition) because the ECG and examination that excluded cardiac and intracranial causes cannot be reproduced remotely. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass = T3.
Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-01-00204 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.
All SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM codes are unverified candidates pending a terminology receipt.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
